title: CheesyCheese
description: Adds a BUNCH of new types of cheese to Minecraft!
body:
There are 4+ new types of cheese!

Normal Cheese
String Cheese
Green Cheese
and Cool Cheese
,etc.

Normal Cheese is like a Golden Carrot!
String Cheese is like a Normal Carrot!
Green Cheese is like a Glow Berry!
and Super Cheese is like a Golden Apple!
,etc.

You can suggest Cheese types too!
